name: latency_critical_text
description: Short text-classification requests with a user-facing latency SLO.

payload_template.text: cloud computing serverless scheduling experiment run {i}

name: delay_tolerant_batch_text
description: Delay-tolerant batch text workload where greener routing should be preferred when SLO permits.

payload_template.text: batch analytics carbon aware workload run {i}

name: strict_ml_inference
description: Latency-sensitive ML inference with a strict SLO.

name: balanced_image_processing
description: Balanced image-processing jobs with moderate latency and carbon constraints.

name: stream_aggregate_delay_tolerant
description: Delay-tolerant stream aggregation workload with numeric event batches.

payload_template.values: expr:[(i + j) % 17 for j in range(20)]
